citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Machine learning algorithms use labeled training data to construct reasoning models that do classification or prediction. Once training is complete, the reasoning model can be applied to new data to solve problems or make decisions.
